title: Bed Bug Treatment in Irvington, NY | $1,200-$3,500
metaDescription: Professional bed bug treatment in Irvington, Westchester. Serving historic homes and modern residences near the Hudson River. Same-day service available. Call now for $1,200-$3,500 solutions.
intro: Bed bugs are an unwelcome reality for Irvington homeowners, from the historic estates along Broadway to modern condos near the Hudson River waterfront. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive bed bug treatment services throughout Irvington and surrounding Westchester communities. Our proven heat treatment and chemical solutions eliminate bed bug infestations at every life stage, protecting your family and restoring peace of mind.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience treating bed bug infestations in Irvington's diverse housing stock, from century-old Victorian homes to newer residential developments. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments and offer same-day service with a 90-day warranty, ensuring complete elimination and your total satisfaction.
localContext: Irvington's beautiful tree-lined streets and proximity to Metro-North make it a desirable Westchester community, but the village's older homes and frequent travel connections can create bed bug challenges. We're familiar with treating everything from historic properties near the Old Croton Aqueduct Trail to apartments near Main Street, understanding the unique pest control needs of this charming Hudson River village.

faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Irvington?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Irvington typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500 depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method selected. We offer free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat bed bugs in my Irvington home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for Irvington residents facing bed bug emergencies. Heat treatments can often be completed in a single day, while chemical treatments may require follow-up visits spaced 2-3 weeks apart for optimal results.

faqs.question: Are your bed bug treatments safe for older Irvington homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, our treatments are specifically designed to be safe and effective for Irvington's historic homes and modern residences alike. We use EPA-approved products and carefully adjust our heat treatment protocols to protect delicate woodwork, antiques, and period features common in the village's older properties.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatment results in Irvington?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We stand behind our work with a comprehensive 90-day warranty on all bed bug treatments in Irvington. If bed bugs return within the warranty period, we'll re-treat your home at no additional charge, ensuring complete elimination of your infestation.
